/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -rdynamic CMakeFiles/tester.dir/src/4_driver/tester_generated_tester.cu.o -o tester  -Wl,-rpath,/soft/libraries/mpi/openmpi/4.1.1/lib -Wl,-Bstatic -lcudart_static -Wl,-Bdynamic -ldl -Wl,-Bstatic -lrt libsweeper.a -Wl,-Bdynamic /soft/libraries/mpi/openmpi/4.1.1/lib/libmpi.so -Wl,-Bstatic -lcudart_static -Wl,-Bdynamic -ldl -Wl,-Bstatic -lrt -Wl,-Bdynamic /soft/libraries/mpi/openmpi/4.1.1/lib/libmpi.so
